step_rationale: Chemokine receptor regulating leukocyte recruitment and platelet oxLDL interactions; thromboinflammatory modulation.
mechanism: CXCR7 coordinates chemotaxis and platelet-leukocyte interactions during plaque inflammation and early thrombotic response in Type 1 MI.

references.title: Platelet ACKR3/CXCR7 favors antiplatelet lipids over an atherothrombotic lipidome and regulates thromboinflammation.
Atypical Roles of the Chemokine Receptor ACKR3/CXCR7 in Platelet Pathophysiology.
Regulation of oxidized platelet lipidome: implications for coronary artery disease.
